LandingPage.subtitle: Fundamental Analysis
LandingPage.description: Detailed valuation analysis using established models: Bazin, Graham, and Gordon. Identify opportunities before others do.
LandingPage.novidadesSub: New markets and tools recently added
LandingPage.method1Desc: Fair price based on historical dividend yield and desired return rate.
LandingPage.method2Desc: Intrinsic value calculated with EPS and BVPS per the classic formula.
LandingPage.method3Desc: Discounted dividend model projecting dividend growth.
LandingPage.cardBrStocksDesc: Complete fundamental analysis with Bazin, Graham, and Gordon models. Data updated daily, dynamic ERP and IPCA.
LandingPage.cardUsaStocksDesc: NASDAQ stock analysis with indicators adapted for the US market. Fixed risk premium and 3% Bazin rate.
LandingPage.cardBrFiiDesc: Analysis of Brazilian REITs with Tijolo (DCF) and Papel. IPCA+ Treasury as benchmark and historical CAGR.
LandingPage.cardUsaReitDesc: NASDAQ REIT analysis with FFO metrics, payout ratio, and valuation. 6% risk premium and 3% Bazin rate.
LandingPage.howItem1Desc: Collects and recalculates valuation indicators daily. Always up-to-date information for your analysis.
LandingPage.howItem2Desc: Complementary data is automatically captured to improve calculation accuracy.
LandingPage.howItem3Desc: Apply filters by indicator, price range, sector, and more. Find undervalued assets in seconds.
LandingPage.footer: decision support tool · does not replace professional analysis
LandingPage.coverageDesc: We don't track every asset. See what percentage of each market our metadata covers — and where the gaps are.

Lgpd.message: This site does not collect personal data. It uses only a language preference cookie.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1Text: Valuation Monitor is a fundamental analysis tool maintained by Renan Oliveira. For questions regarding this policy, contact via LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/in/renansmoliveira/).
Privacy.section2Text: This site does not collect personal data from users. We do not request name, email, CPF, address, phone, or any personally identifiable information. The site processes exclusively public financial data from third parties (Yahoo Finance, StatusInvest, Fundamentus, FGV, B3, Nasdaq Trader) for displaying valuation indicators and coverage statistics.
Privacy.section2Text1: This site does not collect personal data from users. We do not request name, email, CPF, address, phone, or any personally identifiable information.
Privacy.section2Text2: The site processes exclusively public financial data from third parties (Yahoo Finance, StatusInvest, Fundamentus, FGV, B3, Nasdaq Trader) for displaying valuation indicators and coverage statistics.
Privacy.section3Text: This site uses exclusively the NEXT_LOCALE cookie to store your language preference (pt-BR or en). This cookie is strictly functional, stores no personal data, and is not used for tracking. No other tracking technologies are used (web beacons, pixels, fingerprinting, analytics). The only infrastructure data processed is the IP address, used exclusively for rate limiting and stored anonymized (SHA-256 hash with daily salt) for up to 60 seconds.
Privacy.section4Text: The processed data's sole purpose is to display valuation calculations (Bazin, Graham, Gordon) and coverage statistics for Brazilian and US stocks, REITs, and FIIs. There is no automated decision-making based on user profiles.
Privacy.section5Text: We do not share personal data with third parties. Displayed financial data is obtained directly from public sources (Yahoo Finance, StatusInvest, Fundamentus, FGV, B3, Nasdaq Trader) via their public APIs and web pages.
Privacy.section6Text: The Brazilian General Data Protection Law (Law 13.709/2018) guarantees you the rights to confirm processing existence, access data, correct incomplete data, anonymize, block, or delete unnecessary data, and revoke consent. Since we do not store personal data, these rights are automatically satisfied by the absence of collection. For any questions, contact the controller via LinkedIn.
Privacy.section7Text: We adopt the following technical measures: IP address hashing before in-memory storage, automatic 60s TTL for rate limiting data, and error log sanitization to remove personal data. The application is served exclusively over HTTPS.
Privacy.section8Text: This policy may be updated periodically. The last update date is indicated at the top of the page.

Coverage.title: Coverage
Coverage.description: We don't track every asset in each market. This page shows what percentage of the known universe our metadata covers — and where the gaps are. All numbers are cached for 30 days.
Coverage.descBrStocks: Standard B3 Bovespa listings (Novo Mercado, N1, N2, MB, MA, ED)
Coverage.descUsaStocks: Common stocks on NYSE, Nasdaq, NYSE American, NYSE Arca, BATS
Coverage.descUsaReits: Non-ETF REITs identified by name keywords on US exchanges
Coverage.descBrFiis: FIIs listed on B3's official fund registry
Coverage.metaBrStocks: BR Stocks: Universe = 365 active common/preferred stocks identified via Yahoo Finance screener (region=br, stock-only filter, excludes FIIs, ETFs, BDRs). Tracked = 359 (98.4%) covered by our StatusInvest CSV import, with 6 fringe tickers missing (ATED3, AZUL3, BIED3, MMAQ3, MMAQ4, RVEE3).
Coverage.metaUsaStocks: USA Stocks: Universe = NYSE, Nasdaq, NYSE American, NYSE Arca, and BATS common stocks (non-ETF, non-preferred) from Nasdaq Trader daily files. Tracked = intersection with our metadata.
Coverage.metaUsaReits: USA REITs: Universe = non-ETF equities on the same exchanges whose company name contains REIT keywords (REIT, Real Estate, Realty, Property Trust) and doesn't match fund/ETF patterns. Tracked = 253/253 after extending filter with metadata-backed REITs.
Coverage.metaBrFiis: BR FIIs: Universe = 523 funds in B3's official fund registry export CSV. Tracked = 457 matching our FII metadata by base ticker code (87.4%). 66 B3-listed FIIs lack metadata entries.
Coverage.lastUpdate: Data sources: Yahoo Finance, Nasdaq Trader, B3 API, StatusInvest CSV, Fundamentus. Last updated: {date}.
